cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the text. The question is asking for the author's purpose in writing the text. The options are A to D. First, I need to understand what each option is saying. Option A says the purpose is to tell people not to travel any more. The text mentions some airlines suspending flights to affected regions, but it also says there's little risk of contracting the virus on a flight. So maybe the author isn't advising against travel
